name: Rollerblade Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter, honey, sugar, and egg yolk in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Combine flour, ginger, and cinnamon in a small bowl. Add alternately with milk to the butter mixture; beat just until combined. Cover; refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease cookie sheets.
4. Roll dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/4 inch thickness. Cut out cookies using 3 1/2-inch boot cookie cutter. Place cookies 2 inches apart on prepared cookie sheets.
5. Beat egg white and water in a small bowl until combined. Lightly brush the bottom of each boot with egg white mixture. Place 6 toasted oats on the bottom of each boot to represent wheels.
6. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 2 minutes on the cookie sheet. Remove to a wire rack and cool completely.
7. Decorate cookies with colored icings, sugars, and sprinkles. Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
